# DRMN - White Noise & Sleep Sounds App

> Sleep sound machine app for iPhone: rain, fan & white noise, mix sounds, offline. Download DRMN free on App Store—best sounds for sleep, focus & baby sleep.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://drmn.xyz/): App overview and features
- [Privacy Policy](https://drmn.xyz/privacy.html): Privacy and data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://drmn.xyz/terms.html): Terms and conditions

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS (iPhone)
- Price: Free with optional premium features
- File Size: 49.2 MB
- Minimum iOS: iOS 17.1 or later
- Category: Health & Fitness
- Developer: Vladimir Ivakhnenko
- App Store Rating: 4.9/5 stars (10 reviews)
- Users report: 30-50% faster sleep onset

## Features

- White noise, brown noise, dark noise
- Nature sounds (rain, ocean, fire, birds)
- Meditation and focus sounds
- Baby sleep sounds (hair dryer, vacuum, keyboard)
- Sound mixing capabilities
- Offline mode
- Battery-optimized
- Sleep timer with auto-fade
